[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10010000 2
1 00010000 1
2 01010010 3
3 00000100 1
4 10000001 2
5 00000001 1
6 00110001 3
7 10110100 4
